content:
💡 glide | TypeScript
🎯 Primary Use Case: Providing an efficient, keyboard-centric web browsing experience by extending the Firefox browser.
✨ Key Features: • Keyboard navigation • Modal based keymaps • TypeScript configuration • Web extensions API support • Fuzzy tab manager
📖 Summary: Glide Browser is an extensible, keyboard-focused web browser built on Firefox. It aims to provide a highly efficient browsing experience for users who prefer keyboard navigation, offering features like modal keymaps, fuzzy tab management, and site-specific settings.
🔗 Links: • View Project • Homepage ================ 🔓 Open Source
